raw_source.title: [Remote] Web3/Layer2/ZK/DEX 公司诚聘 DevRel Engineer、 APAC Community Lead  薪水 RMB/USD
raw_source.body:
公司/团队介绍
公司成立于19年Web3/Layer2/ZK/DEX，为全球提供现货/合约/Web3/Layer2/ZK/DEX等产品；Office分布新加坡、加拿大、欧美、英国等。

薪资福利待遇
Basic salary+年终（SGD/USDT），双休，国内外团建旅游，足够发展和发挥空间。

地点
工作地点：Remote
联系方式：TG：@jtx_2023

工作性质
是否全职：是
是否远程：是
时区要求：（英国工作时区标准）

岗位要求、职责
Position 一：DevRel Engineer
Job Type: Full-Time ，remote
Salary：$ 96-120K/y
Responsibilities:
• Design and create reference applications showcasing XXX technology.
• Actively engage with developers by answering technical queries, troubleshooting issues, and providing guidance for feature requests and bug reports via GitHub issues.
• Create technical content, including tutorials, documentation, API references, and onboarding guides, ensuring the content is clear, practical, and developer-friendly.
• Organize, host, and deliver workshops, webinars, and training sessions to educate developers on XXX features, best practices, and how to integrate with XXX technology.
• Represent XXX at industry conferences, hackathons, and meetups, fostering relationships with developers, community members, and partners.
• Serve as a trusted advocate for the developer community, gathering feedback and working closely with internal teams to address their needs.
• Collaborate with the marketing, product, and engineering teams to align DevRel efforts with XXX’s business and technical goals. Help drive developer adoption and engagement across different channels and platforms.
• Stay up-to-date with industry trends, emerging technologies, and competitive landscape, providing valuable insights to help guide XXX’s developer relations and community-building strategies.

Qualifications:
• Strong background in software engineering with experience building developer tools or blockchain applications.
• Proven track record of creating high-quality technical content (e.g., blog posts, tutorials, and documentation).
• Experience in developer relations, technical evangelism, or a similar role, with a demonstrated ability to drive developer engagement and adoption.
• Experience organizing and conducting developer-focused events, workshops, or training sessions.
• Exceptional communication and presentation skills, with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.
• Strong networking and relationship-building skills, with experience collaborating effectively with developers, community members, and ecosystem partners.
• Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to think strategically and analytically.
• Excellent organizational skills with the ability to manage time effectively and meet deadlines.
• Ability to work within American time zones.


Position 二：APAC Community Lead
Job Type: Full-Time ，remote
Responsibilities:
1 、Community Strategy & Leadership
2 、Campaign & Activation
3 、Ecosystem & Events
4 、Internal Collaboration & Reporting
Qualifications:
• 3+ years of experience in community management, ecosystem growth, or marketing in crypto or tech.
• Deep crypto-native understanding — DeFi, NFTs, wallets, BTCFi, memes, and culture.
• Proven track record of scaling and energizing communities across multiple platforms.
• Excellent written and verbal communication in English and Chinese.
• Experience in event coordination, including both, online and offline crypto events.
• Experience using community and campaign tools.
• Strong organizational skills — able to define KPIs, report impact, and manage multiple initiatives.
• Self-starter with ownership mentality; capable of working across time zones and fast-moving priorities.

工作环境
Work Life Balance

comments.body: 欢迎您提交招聘信息，Rebase 会整理招聘内容，通过公众号发出。
